title: crepis runcinata var. andersonii
intro: Crepis runcinata var. andersonii, also known as a variant of the runcinate hawk's beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Crepis runcinata var. andersonii include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
